outcome_contract.why: Refunds were completely blocked — bearer-token auth passed middleware but was re-blocked at the route level, and orders were never updated to 'completed' so PM's refund guard rejected every request. A timing attack vulnerability existed in the Axerve internal endpoint.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: All 8 payment integration blockers remediated. Refunds now flow end-to-end for both Stripe and Axerve orders.
